description: Create monthly cohorts from signup dates

example.code:
import pandas as pd
from insightsagents.app.tools.mltools.cohortanalysistools import CohortPipe, form_time_cohorts

# Step 1: Create sample data
sample_data = pd.DataFrame({
    'user_id': range(1, 101),
    'signup_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D'),
    'activity_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D')
})

# Step 2: Initialize pipeline
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)

# Step 3: Form monthly cohorts
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_date',
    cohort_column='signup_month',
    time_period='M',
    format_cohorts=True,
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%d'
)

# Step 4: View results
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'signup_date', 'signup_month']].head())

parameters.date_column: Column containing dates for cohort formation
parameters.cohort_column: Name of the column to store cohort information (default: 'cohort')
parameters.format_cohorts: Whether to format cohorts as readable strings (default: True)
parameters.datetime_format: Format string for parsing dates if not already datetime

description: Create weekly cohorts for detailed analysis

example.code:
import pandas as pd
from insightsagents.app.tools.mltools.cohortanalysistools import CohortPipe, form_time_cohorts

# Step 1: Create sample data
sample_data = pd.DataFrame({
    'user_id': range(1, 101),
    'signup_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D'),
    'activity_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D')
})

# Step 2: Initialize pipeline
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)

# Step 3: Form weekly cohorts
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_date',
    cohort_column='signup_week',
    time_period='W',
    format_cohorts=True
)

# Step 4: View results
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'signup_date', 'signup_week']].head())

parameters.date_column: Column containing dates for cohort formation
parameters.cohort_column: Name of the column to store cohort information (default: 'cohort')
parameters.format_cohorts: Whether to format cohorts as readable strings (default: True)
parameters.datetime_format: Format string for parsing dates if not already datetime

description: Create quarterly cohorts for long-term analysis

example.code:
import pandas as pd
from insightsagents.app.tools.mltools.cohortanalysistools import CohortPipe, form_time_cohorts

# Step 1: Create sample data
sample_data = pd.DataFrame({
    'user_id': range(1, 101),
    'signup_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D'),
    'activity_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D')
})

# Step 2: Initialize pipeline
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)

# Step 3: Form quarterly cohorts
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_date',
    cohort_column='signup_quarter',
    time_period='Q',
    format_cohorts=True
)

# Step 4: View results
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'signup_date', 'signup_quarter']].head())

parameters.date_column: Column containing dates for cohort formation
parameters.cohort_column: Name of the column to store cohort information (default: 'cohort')
parameters.format_cohorts: Whether to format cohorts as readable strings (default: True)
parameters.datetime_format: Format string for parsing dates if not already datetime

example.code:
import pandas as pd
from insightsagents.app.tools.mltools.cohortanalysistools import CohortPipe, form_behavioral_cohorts

# Step 1: Create sample data with subscription plans
sample_data = pd.DataFrame({
    'user_id': range(1, 101),
    'subscription_plan': ['free', 'basic', 'premium', 'enterprise'] * 25,
    'signup_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D')
})

# Step 2: Initialize pipeline
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)

# Step 3: Form behavioral cohorts
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts(
    behavior_column='subscription_plan',
    cohort_column='plan_cohort',
    custom_cohorts={
        'Premium': ['premium', 'enterprise'],
        'Basic': ['basic'],
        'Free': ['free']
    }
)

# Step 4: View results
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'subscription_plan', 'plan_cohort']].head())

parameters.behavior_column: Column containing behavior data for cohort formation
parameters.cohort_column: Name of the column to store cohort information (default: 'cohort')
parameters.custom_cohorts: Dictionary mapping cohort names to custom functions

example.code:
import pandas as pd
from insightsagents.app.tools.mltools.cohortanalysistools import CohortPipe, form_behavioral_cohorts

# Step 1: Create sample data with ages
sample_data = pd.DataFrame({
    'user_id': range(1, 101),
    'age': [20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45, 50, 55, 60, 65] * 10,
    'signup_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D')
})

# Step 2: Initialize pipeline
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)

# Step 3: Form age-based cohorts
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts(
    behavior_column='age',
    cohort_column='age_group',
    conditions={
        '18-24': ('between', 18, 24),
        '25-34': ('between', 25, 34),
        '35-44': ('between', 35, 44),
        '45-54': ('between', 45, 54),
        '55+': ('>', 54)
    }
)

# Step 4: View results
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'age', 'age_group']].head())

parameters.behavior_column: Column containing behavior data for cohort formation
parameters.cohort_column: Name of the column to store cohort information (default: 'cohort')
parameters.conditions: Dictionary mapping cohort names to conditions

example.code:
import pandas as pd
from insightsagents.app.tools.mltools.cohortanalysistools import CohortPipe, form_behavioral_cohorts

# Step 1: Create sample data with purchase counts
sample_data = pd.DataFrame({
    'user_id': range(1, 101),
    'purchases_count': [1, 2, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40] * 10,
    'signup_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D')
})

# Step 2: Initialize pipeline
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)

# Step 3: Form purchase frequency cohorts
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts(
    behavior_column='purchases_count',
    cohort_column='purchase_frequency_segment',
    conditions={
        'High Value': ('>', 10),
        'Medium Value': ('between', 3, 10),
        'Low Value': ('<', 3)
    }
)

# Step 4: View results
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'purchases_count', 'purchase_frequency_segment']].head())

parameters.behavior_column: Column containing behavior data for cohort formation
parameters.cohort_column: Name of the column to store cohort information (default: 'cohort')
parameters.conditions: Dictionary mapping cohort names to conditions

description: Create cohorts combining acquisition source and time period

example.code:
import pandas as pd
from insightsagents.app.tools.mltools.cohortanalysistools import CohortPipe, form_acquisition_cohorts

# Step 1: Create sample data with acquisition sources
sample_data = pd.DataFrame({
    'user_id': range(1, 101),
    'acquisition_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D'),
    'acquisition_source': ['organic', 'paid', 'referral', 'social'] * 25,
    'activity_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D')
})

# Step 2: Initialize pipeline
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)

# Step 3: Form acquisition cohorts
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_acquisition_cohorts(
    acquisition_date_column='acquisition_date',
    acquisition_source_column='acquisition_source',
    cohort_column='acquisition_cohort',
    time_period='M',
    combine_source=True,
    format_cohorts=True
)

# Step 4: View results
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'acquisition_date', 'acquisition_source', 'acquisition_cohort']].head())

parameters.cohort_column: Name of the column to store cohort information (default: 'cohort')
parameters.combine_source: Whether to combine time period with acquisition source (default: True)
parameters.format_cohorts: Whether to format cohorts as readable strings (default: True)
parameters.datetime_format: Format string for parsing dates if not already datetime

description: Create time-based cohorts without combining with source

example.code:
import pandas as pd
from insightsagents.app.tools.mltools.cohortanalysistools import CohortPipe, form_acquisition_cohorts

# Step 1: Create sample data with acquisition sources
sample_data = pd.DataFrame({
    'user_id': range(1, 101),
    'acquisition_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D'),
    'acquisition_source': ['organic', 'paid', 'referral', 'social'] * 25,
    'activity_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D')
})

# Step 2: Initialize pipeline
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)

# Step 3: Form time-only cohorts
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_acquisition_cohorts(
    acquisition_date_column='acquisition_date',
    acquisition_source_column='acquisition_source',
    cohort_column='acquisition_month',
    time_period='M',
    combine_source=False,
    format_cohorts=True
)

# Step 4: View results
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'acquisition_date', 'acquisition_month']].head())

parameters.cohort_column: Name of the column to store cohort information (default: 'cohort')
parameters.combine_source: Whether to combine time period with acquisition source (default: True)
parameters.format_cohorts: Whether to format cohorts as readable strings (default: True)
parameters.datetime_format: Format string for parsing dates if not already datetime
